title: Models
description: Individual pinball machine models (specific editions/variants of a title)

title.description: Slug of the title this model belongs to (references titles.json)

display_type.description: References a display_type value in display_types.json

variant_of.description: Slug of the base model if this is a variant/edition

is_remake.description: Set to false to reject an incorrect OPDB Remake tag

remake_of.description: Slug of the original model this is a remake of

is_conversion.description: Whether this model is a conversion of another machine

converted_from.description: Slug of the model this was converted from
